summary: Iteration 21 - Testing new features: Online users, Private messaging, and AI Dictionary Search. Backend: 11/12 tests PASSED (1 intermittent Cloudflare timeout). Frontend: All features verified working.

minor.issue: Intermittent 520 errors due to Cloudflare timeout when AI response takes >10 seconds
minor.priority: LOW - Cloudflare infrastructure issue, not code bug. AI endpoint works correctly when not timing out.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new features implemented correctly and working
Private messages use conversation_id pattern (sorted user_ids) for efficient lookups
Online users heartbeat uses 5-minute cutoff - appropriate for real-time feel
AI Dictionary search has caching implemented (ai_dictionary_cache collection) - good for performance
seed_data_creation: Created test private messages and second test user for private messaging tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (online users, private chat, AI dictionary) are fully working. The 1 test failure was an intermittent Cloudflare 520 timeout, not a code issue - the AI endpoint works correctly when manually tested.

private_messages.notes: Includes test for sending to nonexistent user (returns 404)

ai_dictionary_search.notes: Uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key. Results are cached in ai_dictionary_cache collection.

verified_elements: Online users strip (shows when users are online)
Tab switching between Community and Chat
AI search button (sparkles icon) appears when 2+ chars typed
Filter results based on search query

api_verification_summary.GET /api/users/online: 200 OK - returns online_count and users array
api_verification_summary.GET /api/private-messages/conversations: 200 OK - returns conversation list with unread counts
